error.signature: message_filters: Dropped messages due to synchronization timeout

verdict.summary: message_filters TimeSynchronizer drops messages because sensor timestamps don't align within the tolerance window.

dead_ends.action: Set slop (time tolerance) to very large values like 10 seconds
dead_ends.why_fails: Pairs messages from completely different time instants; fuses stale data producing wrong results

dead_ends.action: Use exact time synchronizer for hardware sensors
dead_ends.why_fails: Hardware sensors almost never have exactly matching timestamps; drops all messages

workarounds.action: Use ApproximateTimeSynchronizer with appropriate slop for your sensor rates
Check that all sensors use the same time source (use_sim_time consistency)
workarounds.how: ros2 param get /camera use_sim_time; ros2 param get /lidar use_sim_time

workarounds.action: Increase queue_size if sensors have different publication rates
